puzzle.title: The Steadfast Builder of Salvation
puzzle.intro: A figure of immense patience and unwavering conviction, this individual dedicated countless years to a divine mission, facing relentless scorn and rejection. Their story is a powerful testament to faith in the face of overwhelming disbelief, culminating in a momentous event that reshaped the world.
clues: I dedicated an incredibly long period of my life calling my people to the worship of Allah.
My people mocked me and accused me of manifest error and madness.
I was commanded to build something that seemed unusual for my landlocked community.
Only a few believed and joined me and my family on this unique construction.
I carried pairs of every living creature on board, as instructed by Allah.
A great flood engulfed the earth, saving only those who were with me in my vessel, while my own son perished for his disbelief.

outcome.label: Outcome
options: His people were transformed into apes
His people were saved by a miracle
His people were struck by a thunderbolt

puzzle.arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًۭا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًۭا
puzzle.verse: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allāh [any] helpers. (71:25)
